channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Police officer recounts hearing gunshot and seeing Charlie Kirk fall at hearing
item.description: A former Utah Valley University police officer testified Monday that he heard a gunshot and saw Charlie Kirk collapse.

item.title: Florida demonstrates how states can limit rogue judges freeing violent criminals
item.description: Anxiety could ease if actual perpetrators of injustice, both criminals and enabling judges, were removed permanently.

item.title: Trillionaires like Elon Musk are not America's problem; envious leftists are
item.description: Multimillionaire politicians denounce billionaires as evil, cheered by college graduates pretending to be working class.

item.title: John Roberts again undermines SCOTUS legitimacy with conflicting Slaughter and Cook opinions
item.description: In one ruling, SCOTUS affirmed presidential power to fire agency officials; the same day, it created a fourth branch of government.
